Burnt Wood Staff  
 

Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Charges: Unlimited
Skill: 2H Blunt Atk Delay: 20
DMG: 8 Dmg Bonus: 36
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Effect: Cinder Bolt (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 13.5) at Level 46
WT: 6.4 Size: LARGE
Class: MAG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Teek server, during kunark. names omitted for privacy. both were looted in Chardok.

[Tue May 28 20:58:17 2024] --xxxxxxx has looted a Burnt Wood Staff from a Greater Guardian's corpse.--
[Sat Jul 06 11:24:20 2024] --xxxxxxx has looted a Burnt Wood Staff from an imperial construct's corpse.--

▲ Page top
prices vary
QuoteReply
# Dec 08 2003 at 4:02 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248645137
53 posts
on FV we have just entered hyper inflation, prices often doubling within a week. however, i bought this one for 1000pp, when someone wanted to delete account. i believe to have reason to be happy.

Estania
45th erudite magician
▲ Page top
I have one!
QuoteReply
# Oct 02 2003 at 1:33 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592760194658
View User Forum
30 posts
I picked up the staff off the bazaar the other day.

1. The item can be clicked, but must bo done while staff is equipped (ie since it is a two-handed weapon, it uses up both primary and secondary slots), and is thus different from the white ceramic band which can be clicked from inventory.

3. Flame bolt is line-of-sight only ... using it on slopes and mountainous terrain can be pain because the bolt does not land.

4. The cast time is 13+ secs .... reeeaalllly long time, but save on mana and there is no cast interval.

Overall, I have had to change my tactics slightly when using the staff, but I am pretty happy with it.

Hope this helps,

Cheers,

Deanorn on Quellious
Shine on Lights!
▲ Page top

# Aug 05 2002 at 12:44 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591756590393
13 posts
I don't believe the proc starts kicking in till lvl 46, so wouldn't be able to twink a lower lvl mage with it.

Oh, and you want to see overprice? Was for sale all weekend on Veeshan for 50k! I have a feeling it will be in their inventory for a while at those prices...

- Barkley

my wife has a lvl 49 mage. the damage bracelet lets this hit up to 400 damage now. i dont think the casting time focues works on it though
▲ Page top
Burnt Staff Facts
QuoteReply
# Feb 14 2002 at 1:57 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592252217967
4 posts
8/20 2HB weight 6.9 Unlimited Right Click Cinder Bolt 333DD. Requires Line of Sight, but much easier to hit mob than regular bolt spells. There is a 13.5 second cast time, No recast time.One of the best Mage weapons out there, right up there with boots of bladecalling which are no-drop. From what I have seen in 2 years on EQ, this item is ultra-rare.Must be equipped to work.
▲ Page top
dropped 2/2/2
QuoteReply
# Feb 02 2002 at 11:30 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592253374548
2 posts
Got one today, 2/2/2. Dropped from a Lesser Guardian...i believe the name is right...the golem looking things on the bridge near where the Bridgkeeper spawns. Made one mage quite happy.

Proc
QuoteReply
# Jan 15 2002 at 9:07 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591750106032
View User Forum
Scholar
221 posts
Everyone is talking about R-clicking to nuke from this stick, but the info show it's a Random/Unlimited proc. To my knowledge that means you must be engaged in combat for the bolt to proc. Can someone in possession of this staff clarify?
▲ Page top
RE: Proc
QuoteReply
# Sep 01 2003 at 8:19 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593965779047
Scholar
92 posts
This item is indeed clickable. Allakhazam's data is entered manually, and proc vs. click info is often not available, Allakhazam often guesses proc for any weapon.
▲ Page top
Burnt Wood, Lammy and I
QuoteReply
# Dec 08 2001 at 1:15 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592247435153
497 posts
I'd been sitting on one of these bad-boys for a while. I have a 31 WAR who really needed a Lammy, and so I offered up a trade. Best I was able to get was Lammy+1k for this. I think that's a bit low, but honestly a lot of mages just don't want to give up that second slot to a 2HB.

All this on 7th hammer.
▲ Page top

yeah, clicking on item while in inventory gives you the "must equip to use".

btw someone GAVE me one of these bad boys. Only 35 now, but when get up a few levels will be bad news. I'm a 'bolt mage' anyways, so right up my alley

▲ Page top
burnt staff
QuoteReply
# Mar 19 2001 at 8:39 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592756958904
2 posts
casting time is 15 seconds. It begins to work at 46 and it's an awesome item in groups and in solo.
A little trick : pull with malosi, send pet, right click staff, quickly write /sit and enter, med 10 seconds, write /sit off and enter. Repeat until done, nuke once if needed :) This way you can med for about half a bubble mana during fight while chain casting 333 bolts every 15 secs (enough to kill a low blue at 54 with an air pet).
This staff changed my life :)
▲ Page top
RE: burnt staff
QuoteReply
# Jun 28 2001 at 7:00 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591751009961
Scholar
26 posts
With the patch as of June 27th 2001, the ability to med while waiting on the staff is not available.
▲ Page top
RE: burnt staff

just got one of these it is awsome clickable 333 dd a mana saver and a half. btw the wt is not 10 it is 6.9 cast time is a bit long though about the same as arch shielding not sure what lvl it becomes usable. it works for me at lvl 52 but would not for my friend at lvl 21
